---
title: "16 Disturbance: Vegetation Dynamics (The Evolution)"
---

-   Land Cover/Vegetation change
-   biomass pool changes
-   redefine world functionality (redefine_world\_: multiplier, thin_remain, thin_harvest, thin_snags, thin_harvest) to invoke:
    -   drought induced mortality
    -   fuel treatments
        -   thinning, controlled burns
-   maybe include redefine world info on urbanization?
